transactions: Before 1961 Season:Signed by theNew York Yankeesas an amateur free agent.
December 5, 1969:Traded by theNew York YankeeswithFrank Fernándezto theOakland AthleticsforDanny CaterandOssie Chavarria.
June 11, 1970:Traded by theOakland AthleticswithTito Franconato theMilwaukee BrewersforSteve Hovley.
